omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Hiface may also collect and gather user contents (e.g., photos, screenshots, comments, and other materials) that you create on the Service. Your photo can be taken by other users on Hiface, and if they use the capturing function provided by Hiface, those photos can be stored and used for Hiface and third-party services (e.g., Facebook, etc.). You can change the sharing option of third parties on the Hiface settings. If you do not agree with all the terms of this Privacy Policy, please do not use the Service.
